title: SPRAYZ Large 500ml Spray Bottles For Cleaning Solutions and Gardening, Plant, Water, Durable Trigger Sprayer, Refillable, Spray Bottle for Hair, All Directions, Clear Plastic Bottle 2x 500ml
features: SPRAY AT ALL ANGLES - The high quality, all-plastic pre-compression trigger allows you to use the spray bottles at all angles - even upside down. Get into those tricky bits while cleaning.
2 PACK - Package contains 2 x 500ml re-usable empty spray bottles for cleaning solutions complete with 2 spray triggers. Perfect spray bottle for hair.

HIGH QUALITY 500ML PLASTIC BOTTLES AND TRIGGERS- The PET plastic bottles are durable and strong, which means the spray bottles will last. The trigger sprayers have been stress tested with 5,000 continuous sprays and perform fantastically. They out-perform any other spray trigger, making it the fastest selling trigger on the market across the world.
CLEAR BOTTLES TO SEE CONTENTS - The 500ml spray bottles are clear plastic, allowing you to see exactly what is in them, making them perfect for cleaning and using around the home or work.

LEAK PROOF - the high-quality seal used on the nozzle ensures this product does not leak no matter what liquid is used in the bottle and no matter what angle you hold it at - even when spraying upside down. No one wants we hands!
SPRAY BOTTLES FOR CLEANING SOLUTIONS - These Spray Bottles are perfect for cleaning solutions, plants and lots more. Also a great spray bottle for hair
description: Product Description High Performance Nozzle These spray bottles are designed for efficient spraying without blockages providing a smooth and consistent spray. Reliable and long lasting spray trigger that you can count on time and time again. Easy to Hold Grooved Grip We wanted to offer a quality product with an enhanced user experience that is easy to hold and use. These spray bottles are a breeze to use without stressing your hands and fingers. Easy Press Pre-Compression Trigger Molded plastic pre-compression trigger with smooth edges and rounded corners is comfortable to press. It allows you to use the spray bottles at all angles and even upside down.
